rows.wrapperRole: Mexican San Andrés wrapper — dark, rugged leaf; cocoa, earth, and savory spice. Not Connecticut natural, not Nicaraguan puro.
rows.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder supports combustion through the thick short-gordo format.
rows.fillerRole: Dominican, Honduran, and Nicaraguan filler blend — not a puro. Blended by General Cigar Co., rolled at STG Estelí (Nicaragua).
rows.flavorNotes: earth, savory spice, cedar, cocoa, dark sweetness
rows.bestFor: After dinner, bourbon pairing, experienced smoker who wants a Best Buy with San Andrés weight — not a morning coffee cigar.
rows.avoidIf: Morning coffee or espresso (60-ring gordo outlasts the cup; heavy wrapper coats the palate). Beginner, nicotine-sensitive, user wants mild Connecticut or a true puro story.
rows.whyRecommend: Recommend for value seekers citing CA 2024 Best Buy — Lunar New Year Dragon Fire short gordo at ~$7, General Cigar / STG Estelí production.
rows.catalogLine: Punch Dragon Fire · 5 × 60 · Short Gordo · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $7 · Notes: earth, savory spice, cedar, cocoa
rows.memberBlurb: Punch Dragon Fire — General Cigar blend, STG Estelí. Mexican San Andrés over Nicaraguan binder and a Dominican/Honduran/Nicaraguan filler stack. ~$7 short gordo (5 × 60), flat head. After-dinner strength, not a morning smoke.
